questionHtml: Describe, in words, the change in the angle of depression from point H to point B as the horizontal distance between the balloon and the building increases.
markschemeHtml:
the angle of depression from the hot air balloon) gets smaller          A1

(as the horizontal distance increases)

 

[1 mark]
